title: Syrian Style Falafel
description: A flavorful and crispy Middle Eastern inspired falafel dish, served in a pita with your favorite toppings. This recipe is a delicious and easy way to enjoy the flavors of Syria.
instructions: Prepare the falafel mix according to the package instructions.
Form the falafel mix into small patties.
Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the falafel is baking, stir-fry your choice of vegetables in a pan with a little olive oil.
Warm the pita breads in the oven for a few minutes.
Assemble the falafel in the pita breads with hummus, stir-fried vegetables, parsley, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
